modal.title: Create new '{{name}}'

filename.label: Filename
filename.desc: ID pre-filled — type the name in front

modal.idWarning: ID {{id}} is not in the filename — it will be reassigned.
modal.errIdPropertyNotSet: ID property not set — could not locate file after template was applied (moved to unknown location?).

idTypes.heading: ID types
idTypes.desc: Each entry creates a command in the command palette. New types are available immediately.

rebuild.name: Rebuild index
rebuild.desc: Scan vault for existing ids and update the cache — run this after creating files manually.

mask.label: Mask
mask.desc: Prefix followed by "#" digit placeholders — e.g. "p####" creates p0001, p0002 …

idProperty.label: ID property
idProperty.desc: Optional frontmatter property for storing the ID, e.g. "id" — used during rebuild and file creation.
